tranche_title: LEGORACLE replay gate — freeze determinism with automated replay enforcement

claims.statement: E12 replay gate test file exists at canonical CI path.
SHIP fixture exists and is the input for the positive replay path.
NO_SHIP fixture exists and is the input for the negative replay path.
SHIP fixture → run_tribunal → verdict=SHIP, output_sha256=21d3c41026c295c18b5f36c02b2c9369ba3e280f80ef49d8cb5be172e850d051, stable across replay (run1_hash==run2_hash).
claims.note: Emitted by build_replay_gate_receipt(): hash_equal=true, verdict_stable=true, verdict=SHIP.

claims.statement: NO_SHIP fixture → run_tribunal → verdict=NO_SHIP, output_sha256=ce084386bd9455191505d5b71d0a6f159fc696e7d55df3a3154fd566b011df69, stable across replay (run1_hash==run2_hash).
claims.note: Emitted by build_replay_gate_receipt(): hash_equal=true, verdict_stable=true, verdict=NO_SHIP.

claims.statement: Negative harness: mutating the input (claim_id byte change) produces a different decision_record hash, proving input-sensitivity.
Replay-gate test suite is 4/4 green (test_ship_fixture_is_deterministic, test_no_ship_fixture_is_deterministic, test_byte_mutation_changes_hash, test_replay_gate_receipt_is_pass).

Full helen_os/tests/ suite: 373/374 pass. The 1 failure (test_legacy_schemas_directory_is_purged) is the pre-existing SEAM-001 C12 BLOCKER documented in GOVERNANCE/CLOSURES/SEAM-001-schema-authority-V6.json. Not introduced by E12.
No kernel files mutated by E12. Only additions: 1 test file + 2 fixture JSONs + 1 receipt (this file). All non-sovereign surface.
Environment pin: python 3.9.6, legoracle_v13rc module at repo root. Recorded in the emitted REPLAY_GATE_RECEIPT_V1 object (environment field).

halt_condition: E12 sealed. E13 NOT opened per bounded-tranche discipline: emit sub-receipt, halt, re-rank before next epoch.
note: E12 freezes LEGORACLE's run_tribunal() behavior via automated replay enforcement. Acceptance criteria all met: (a) identical input → identical decision_record hash, (b) SHIP fixture stays SHIP on replay, (c) NO_SHIP fixture stays NO_SHIP on replay, (d) CI exits non-zero on any mismatch, (e) zero kernel files mutated. Parallel session at ~/Documents/GitHub/helen_os_v1/ cum_hash b3415eb3edfb reached the same seal via a different path (8 tests + 12 tests = 20 tests); this session's gate is narrower (4 tests) but covers the four required acceptance criteria with one negative harness. HAL gate: PASS. Awaiting re-rank before E13.
